text_original: Of every ten three are ministers of life (to themselves); and three are ministers of death.
text_normalized: Of every ten three are ministers of life (to themselves); and three are ministers of death.

text_original: There are also three in every ten whose aim is to live, but whose movements tend to the land (or place) of death. And for what reason?
text_normalized: There are also three in every ten whose aim is to live, but whose movements tend to the land (or place) of death. And for what reason?

text_original: Because of their excessive endeavours to perpetuate life.
text_normalized: Because of their excessive endeavours to perpetuate life.

text_original: But I have heard that he who is skilful in managing the life entrusted to him for a time travels on the land without having to shun rhinoceros or tiger, and enters a host without having to avoid buff coat or sharp weapon.
text_normalized: But I have heard that he who is skilful in managing the life entrusted to him for a time travels on the land without having to shun rhinoceros or tiger, and enters a host without having to avoid buff coat or sharp weapon.

text_original: The rhinoceros finds no place in him into which to thrust its horn, nor the tiger a place in which to fix its claws, nor the weapon a place to admit its point. And for what reason?
text_normalized: The rhinoceros finds no place in him into which to thrust its horn, nor the tiger a place in which to fix its claws, nor the weapon a place to admit its point. And for what reason?

text_original: Because there is in him no place of death.
text_normalized: Because there is in him no place of death.
